description: Always-invested quality stocks weighted by momentum×inverse-vol. 60% equity + 40% SPY trend overlay. Vol-targeted to 10%. Monthly weight rebalance only.

how_it_works.regime_detection: SPY above 50-day SMA = SPY trend component active
how_it_works.bull_allocation: 60% in momentum×inverse-vol weighted quality stocks + 40% SPY (when trending)
how_it_works.vol_targeting: Position scaled to target 10% annualized portfolio vol
how_it_works.rebalancing: Monthly weight adjustment (~2 bps cost). Same stocks, different weights.
